'''hosabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:chadless|chadless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-s-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chadless|chadless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hosabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hosabithi|hosabithi]] || [[word:hosabiji|hosabiji]] || [[word:hosabishi|hosabishi]] || [[word:hosabiki|hosabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hosabuthuthu|hosabuthuthu]] || [[word:hosabujuju|hosabujuju]] || [[word:hosabushushu|hosabushushu]] || [[word:hosabukuku|hosabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hosabuthu|hosabuthu]] || [[word:hosabuju|hosabuju]] || [[word:hosabushu|hosabushu]] || [[word:hosabuku|hosabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hosabufthuf|hosabufthuf]] || [[word:hosabufjuf|hosabufjuf]] || [[word:hosabufshuf|hosabufshuf]] || [[word:hosabufkuf|hosabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hosabethe|hosabethe]] || [[word:hosabeje|hosabeje]] || [[word:hosabeshe|hosabeshe]] || [[word:hosabeke|hosabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hosabothotho|hosabothotho]] || [[word:hosabojojo|hosabojojo]] || [[word:hosaboshosho|hosaboshosho]] || [[word:hosabokoko|hosabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hosabotho|hosabotho]] || [[word:hosabojo|hosabojo]] || [[word:hosabosho|hosabosho]] || [[word:hosaboko|hosaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hosabofthof|hosabofthof]] || [[word:hosabofjof|hosabofjof]] || [[word:hosabofshof|hosabofshof]] || [[word:hosabofkof|hosabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hosabÃŸfthÃŸf|hosabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hosabÃŸfjÃŸf|hosabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hosabÃŸfshÃŸf|hosabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hosabÃŸfkÃŸf|hosabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hosabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|hosabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hosabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|hosabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hosabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|hosabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hosabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|hosabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hosabÃŸfthÃŸf|hosabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hosabÃŸfjÃŸf|hosabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hosabÃŸfshÃŸf|hosabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hosabÃŸfkÃŸf|hosabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hosabÃŸfthÃŸf|hosabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hosabÃŸfjÃŸf|hosabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hosabÃŸfshÃŸf|hosabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hosabÃŸfkÃŸf|hosabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hosabÃḊthÃḊ|hosabÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:hosabÃḊjÃḊ|hosabÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:hosabÃḊshÃḊ|hosabÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:hosabÃḊkÃḊ|hosabÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hosabathatha|hosabathatha]] || [[word:hosabajaja|hosabajaja]] || [[word:hosabashasha|hosabashasha]] || [[word:hosabakaka|hosabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hosabatha|hosabatha]] || [[word:hosabaja|hosabaja]] || [[word:hosabasha|hosabasha]] || [[word:hosabaka|hosabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hosabafthaf|hosabafthaf]] || [[word:hosabafjaf|hosabafjaf]] || [[word:hosabafshaf|hosabafshaf]] || [[word:hosabafkaf|hosabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:hosabasha|hosabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:hosabshÃḋsha|hosabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hosabrosha|hosabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hosabmusha|hosabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:hosabyasha|hosabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohosabnkshÃḋsha|gohosabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohosabnkrosha|gohosabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohosabnkmusha|gohosabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohosabnkyasha|gohosabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:hosasabasha|hosasabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hosasabshÃḋsha|hosasabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hosasabrosha|hosasabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hosasabmusha|hosasabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hosasabyasha|hosasabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohosasabnkshÃḋsha|gohosasabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohosasabnkrosha|gohosasabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohosasabnkmusha|gohosasabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohosasabnkyasha|gohosasabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hesÃḊbasha|hesÃḊbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hesÃḊbshÃḋsha|hesÃḊbshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hesÃḊbrosha|hesÃḊbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hesÃḊbmusha|hesÃḊbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hesÃḊbyasha|hesÃḊbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohesÃḊbnkshÃḋsha|gohesÃḊbnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohesÃḊbnkrosha|gohesÃḊbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohesÃḊbnkmusha|gohesÃḊbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohesÃḊbnkyasha|gohesÃḊbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:hosfabasha|hosfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hosfabshÃḋsha|hosfabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hosfabrosha|hosfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hosfabmusha|hosfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hosfabyasha|hosfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohosfabnkshÃḋsha|gohosfabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohosfabnkrosha|gohosfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohosfabnkmusha|gohosfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohosfabnkyasha|gohosfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
